arts.ttl: Erling Haaland a doubt to face Real Madrid and Liverpool
arts.sum: Manchester City forward Erling Haaland is a doubt to face Real Madrid and Liverpool next week after sustaining a knee injury. Haaland was substituted late on in Manchester City’s 4-0 win over Newcastle in the Premier League on Saturday. The Norwegian appeared in discomfort after jarring his knee in the clash, that saw Omar Marmoush […] The post Erling Haaland a doubt to face Real Madrid and Liverpool first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Liverpool have “very strong” interest in rival player who would cost over £100m
arts.sum: Liverpool are keen on signing the Newcastle United striker Alexander Isak at the end of the season. According to Football Insider, they have a “very strong” interest in the 25-year-old striker who has scored 19 goals for the Magpies this season. He is valued in excess of £100 million and Liverpool manager Arne Slot feels […] The post Liverpool have “very strong” interest in rival player who would cost over £100m appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea, Liverpool & Tottenham offer £50m for “absolute gem” of a player
arts.sum: Crystal Palace defender Marc Guehi has been linked with a move away from the club in recent months. The 24-year-old central defender was linked with a move away from the London club during the January window as well, and it appears that top clubs are ready to return for him in the summer. arts.ttl: Liverpool v Wolves: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 2pm GMT kick-off Live scores | Read Football Daily | And mail Daniel So where is the game? I’m certain that Wolves, like every team facing Liverpool, will target the space in and around around and behind Alexander-Arnold who, for all his glorious passing and crossing, lack defensive nous and recovery pace. There could scarcely be a duo better-placed to exploit that than Ait-Nouri and Cunha while, on the other side, Semedo and Sarabia will also feel they can do something against the flagging Andy Robertson, especially on the counter. Liverpool, meanwhile, will expect to outnumber Wolves in midfield, therefore dominating the ball, targeting the space behind the wing-backs with Jota scavenging in the box. And if all else fails, they can just give it Salah. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Why Arne Slot is in the Liverpool dugout vs Wolves despite Everton red card
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot was sent off at Goodison Park on Wednesday night, but the Dutchman will not yet serve his touchline ban.
